context: Tests whether the agent writes a Lambda handler that validates a shared-secret header, parses the batched body, switches on the presence schema, dedups by id, and returns a single 200.

checklist.name: Reads shared secret header
checklist.description: Handler reads event.headers['x-pubnub-secret'] (or equivalent case-insensitive lookup) to verify the request

checklist.name: Loads expected secret from env
checklist.description: Compares against process.env.PUBNUB_SHARED_SECRET (not a hardcoded literal)

checklist.name: Returns 401 on mismatch
checklist.description: Returns { statusCode: 401, ... } when the secret does not match, without proceeding to process the batch

checklist.name: Parses event.body JSON
checklist.description: Calls JSON.parse on event.body (since API Gateway proxy payloads arrive as JSON strings)

checklist.name: Iterates body.data
checklist.description: Reads the events array from the parsed body's data field

checklist.name: Dedup by event.id
checklist.description: Maintains a Set at module scope keyed by event.id and skips re-processing

checklist.name: Returns 200 once per batch
checklist.description: Returns { statusCode: 200, ... } after the entire batch, never per item, and never a non-2xx for partial failure

checklist.name: Comment covers all three risks
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment mentions all three of: shared-secret validation, retry-driven idempotency, and warm-container Set behavior

checklist.name: Exports stubs
checklist.description: Exports onJoin, onLeave, onTimeout, onUnknown, and the seen Set as named exports
